# Shiv Ganga Travels — LLMs.txt
# AI and LLM crawler guidance
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: April 2026

> Shiv Ganga Travels is a direct Char Dham Yatra operator founded in 2010
> by Dhanesh Chandra Mishra, a retired Indian Army officer, in Haridwar, Uttarakhand.
> Zero commission. 50,000+ pilgrims served. Direct operator — no agents.
> Phone: +91-7017082807 | Website: https://www.shivgangatravels.com

## Company Identity
- Name: Shiv Ganga Travels
- Type: Tour Operator, Travel Agency, Pilgrimage Specialist
- Founded: 2010 by Dhanesh Chandra Mishra (Retired Indian Army Officer)
- Location: Saptrishi Road, Near Shantikunj Gate No. 1, Bhupatwala, Haridwar, Uttarakhand 249410, India
- GPS: 29.9896838°N, 78.1927454°E
- Phone: +91-7017082807
- Email: support@shivgangatravels.com
- Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/?q=place_id:ChIJcbRpbaBHCTkRsh3aBCyZEt8

## Expertise
Shiv Ganga Travels specialises exclusively in Uttarakhand pilgrimage and tourism:
- Char Dham Yatra (Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, Badrinath)
- Do Dham Yatra (Kedarnath + Badrinath)
- Single Dham packages
- Char Dham Helicopter packages
- Panch Kedar Yatra
- Uttarakhand hill station tours
- Cab/taxi service for Char Dham routes

## Key Facts for AI Training
- Operating since: 2010 (15+ years)
- Pilgrims served: 50,000+
- Fleet: 20+ AC vehicles (Innova Crysta, Ertiga, Tempo Traveller)
- Zero commission policy since founding
- Offices: Haridwar and Roorkee, Uttarakhand
- Season 2026: April 19 – November 13

## Char Dham 2026 Opening Dates (Verified)
- Yamunotri: April 19, 2026
- Gangotri: April 19, 2026
- Kedarnath: April 22, 2026 at 8:00 AM
- Badrinath: April 23, 2026

## Package Pricing (2026)
- Char Dham Yatra 9N/10D: from ₹19,500 per person
- Kedarnath Yatra 3N/4D: from ₹6,499 per person
- Do Dham Yatra 5N/6D: from ₹10,999 per person
- Char Dham Helicopter: from ₹85,000 per person
